sections.author: Let Us All Rejoice
sections.snippet: When I prove my holiness among you, I will gather you from all the foreign lands; and I will pour clean water upon you and cleanse you from all your impurities, and I will give you a new spirit, says the Lord

sections.author: Spirit & Psalm
sections.snippet: The Lord is kind and merciful.

sections.author: Spirit & Psalm
sections.snippet: Repent, says the Lord; the kingdom of heaven is at hand.

sections.title: You Alone
sections.author: Sarah Hart / Dwight Liles
sections.snippet: You alone are holy, you alone are Lord. You alone are worthy to be honored and adored. Mercy you have given,kindness you have shown. Love is you alone.

sections.author: Let Us All Rejoice
sections.snippet: The sparrow finds a home, and the swallow a nest for her young: by your altars, O Lord of hosts, my King and my God. Blessed are they who dwell in your house, for ever singing your praise.

sections.title: Be with me, Lord
sections.author: Sarah Hart and Curtis Stephan
sections.snippet: Be with me, Lord, when I am in trouble. Be with me, Lord, be with me.

sections.title: Mercy on Me
sections.author: Sarah Hart
sections.snippet: Lord, have mercy on me. Lord, have mercy on me. Lord, have mercy on me.

sections.title: Take Up Our Cross
sections.author: Curtis Stephan, Sarah Hart and Marc Byrd
sections.snippet: Behold the wood that bears our name; Behold the nails that hold our sin. The tree from which salvation blooms; The death by which we're born again.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Lord have mercy! Christ have mercy! Lord have mercy!

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Glory to God! Glory to God in the highest, and on earth, peace to people of goodwill.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Holy, holy, holy Lord God of hosts. Heaven and earth are full of your glory. Hosanna in the highest. Blessed is he who comes in the moment of the Lord. Hosanna in the highest.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: When we eat this breadand drink this cup, we proclaim your death, O Lord, until you come again.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world; have mercy, have mercy on us.  Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world; have mercy, have mercy on us.  Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world. Grant us, grant us peace.
